title: Usopp Is Hurt
description: Usopp formally challenges Luffy for the Going Merry, turning grief into a duel that the crew cannot stop.
scene: Across pages 7, 8, 9, 10, this part follows Paulie, Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Zoro. Usopp formally challenges Luffy for the Going Merry, turning grief into a duel that the crew cannot stop.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: who could've done it and why......

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: I think it might be... the govern-ment.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: Wow! He must be one important guy...

summary: Usopp formally challenges Luffy for the Going Merry, turning grief into a duel that the crew cannot stop.
